description_long: This is a modern double bed with a large, rectangular, upholstered headboard that extends beyond the width of the mattress, integrating two matching nightstands on either side. The bed features a plush, fabric-covered frame in a muted taupe color, with a thick, soft mattress topped by neatly arranged white pillows and layered bedding. The bedding includes a fitted sheet, a gray blanket, and a taupe comforter, all draped naturally over the mattress. The nightstands are sleek and minimalist, finished in a dark color that contrasts with the lighter tones of the bed. The overall design is contemporary and streamlined, suitable for upscale urban interiors. The bed appears sturdy and comfortable, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A modern double bed with an extended upholstered headboard, integrated nightstands, and layered bedding in neutral tones. The design is contemporary and visually cohesive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, rectangular headboard and the top edge of the bedding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's thickness, layered bedding, and one of the integrated nightstands.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full bed, both nightstands, pillows, and the arrangement of bedding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other nightstand and the draping of the comforter and blanket.
